stemHtml: A twin spool gas turbine engine is one in which the…

options.a: Turbines are free to rotate at speeds that differ from their associated compressors.
options.b: LP turbine drives both the LP compressor and the HP compressor.
options.c: LP turbine drives the LP compressor and the HP turbine drives the HP compressor.
options.d: LP compressor drives the HP compressor.
